omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Some Poppo related features allow you to provide shared information to audiences outside the Poppo Network - for example, publicly accessible blogs and forums, or certain social media features in Poppo allow you to republish and disclose shared information.If you use these features to share information, it may be read or used by third parties not related to us. You can also associate your Poppo contact list with the contact list on your device and / or in the third-party service account to search for and
